Hilt module that provides database dependencies including the Room database instance and all DAO interfaces.

DIG - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.ToolType
Dig tool for clearing squares (destroys fossils).
DigSiteCoord - Record Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo
Record representing a coordinate position on a dig site grid.

Creates an instance of a DigSiteCoord record class.

Entity class representing a single square within a dig site grid.

Implementation of DigSiteSquareRepository that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database operations.
DigSiteSquareState - Enum Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type
Enumeration representing the possible states of a dig site square in the fossil sweeper game.
DigSiteView - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.view
Custom view for rendering the dig site game board.

Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context.

Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context and attribute set.

Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context, attributes, and default style.
DigSiteView(Context, AttributeSet, int, int) - Constructor for class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.view.DigSiteView
Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context, attributes, and default style resources.
DUG - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState
Square has been (destructively) dug up.

EXTRACT - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.ToolType
Extract tool for carefully removing fossils without destroying them.
EXTRACTED - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState
An Extractor tool has been used on this square.

F

FENCE - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.ToolType
Fence tool for marking suspected fossil locations.
FENCED - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState
Square is marked with a fence.

SCAN - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.ToolType
Scan tool for revealing fossil locations and automatically digging or extracting them.
selectAll() - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.FossilDao
Retrieves all fossils from the database as observable live data.
selectAll() - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao
Retrieves all user profiles from the database as observable live data.
selectByCoordinates(long, int, int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteSquareDao
Retrieves a single dig site square by its coordinates within a specific grid.
selectByGridId(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteSquareDao
Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
selectById(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteGridDao
Retrieves a single dig site grid by its primary key.
selectById(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteSquareDao
Retrieves a single dig site square by its primary key.
selectById(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.FossilDao
Retrieves a single fossil by its primary key.
selectById(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao
Retrieves a single user profile by its primary key as observable live data.
selectByIdSync(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao
Retrieves a single user profile by its primary key (non-LiveData version).
selectByOauthKey(String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao
Retrieves a single user profile by its OAuth key (for Google sign-in).
selectByPlayerId(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteGridDao
Retrieves all dig site grids for a specific player as observable live data.
selectLiveByOauthKey(String) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao
 
selectRandomUnassigned(int) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.FossilDao
Retrieves a list of unassigned fossils (not referenced by any CollectedFossil).
selectScannerCountById(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao
Retrieves the scanner item count for a specific user as observable live data.
selectWithSquares(long) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteGridDao
Retrieves a dig site grid with all its associated squares using a database view.
setBelongingGridId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare
Sets the foreign key reference to the grid this square belongs to.
setCollectingUser(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil
Sets the foreign key reference to the user who collected this fossil.

setDateTimeCollected(Instant) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil
Sets the timestamp when this fossil was collected.

Sets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.
setFavorite(boolean) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil
Sets whether this fossil is marked as a favorite by the user.
setFavoriteState(CollectedFossil, boolean) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.CollectedFossilRepository
Updates the favorite status of a collected fossil asynchronously.

Associates a fossil type with a collected fossil asynchronously.
setFossil(CollectedFossil, Fossil) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl
 
setFossilStatsId(Long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil
Sets the foreign key reference to the fossil type.
setGeologicalEra(String) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil
Sets the geological era this fossil is from.
setGridSquares(Map<DigSiteCoord, DigSiteSquare>) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.view.DigSiteView
Sets the grid data to display and triggers a layout or invalidation as needed.
setHasFossil(boolean) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare
Sets whether this square contains a fossil.
setHeight(int) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
Sets the height of this grid in squares.
setId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil
Sets the primary key identifier for this collected fossil.
setId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
Sets the primary key identifier for this dig site grid.
setId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare
Sets the primary key identifier for this square.
setId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil
Sets the primary key identifier for this fossil.
setId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.UserProfile
Sets the primary key identifier for this user profile.
setImageUri(Uri) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil
Sets the URI of the image resource for this fossil.
setLastModified(Instant) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare
Sets the timestamp when this square was last modified.
setLatinName(String) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil
Sets the scientific latin name of this fossil.
setMooreNeighborFossils(int) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare
Sets the count of fossils in the Moore neighborhood (8 surrounding squares).
setOauthKey(String) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.UserProfile
Sets the OAuth key used for Google Sign-In authentication.
setOnCellClickListener(Consumer<DigSiteCoord>) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.view.DigSiteView
Sets the listener to be called when a cell is clicked.
setOriginKey(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil
Sets the lookup key for the originating database.
setPlayerId(long) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
Sets the foreign key reference to the user playing this grid.
setRemainingBrushes(int) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
Sets the number of brush items remaining for extracting fossils.
setScannerItems(int) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.UserProfile
Sets the number of scanner items available to this user.
setStartTime(Instant) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid
Sets the timestamp when gameplay started on this grid.
setState(DigSiteSquareState) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare
Sets the current state of this square.
